creator: anarcat@tao.ca
text:
Ok. I'm a little confused by the patch. I don't think I haven't been
able to aply it very well. I'm not really a experienced patch user. ;)

Here's what I did on the patch I fetched:

# patch < ~anarcat/vorbis-tools.diff
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -ruN --exclude=CVS vorbis-tools/files/patch-ac
vorbis-tools~/files/patch-ac
|--- vorbis-tools/files/patch-ac        Thu Mar  1 01:36:40 2001
|+++ vorbis-tools~/files/patch-ac       Wed Dec 31 16:00:00 1969
--------------------------
File to patch: files/patch-ac
Patching file files/patch-ac using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 0.
[...]
and then it patches a few other files, asking again for pathname when
hitting patch-ad. Did I do this right?

Anyways, I failed to build this again:

...
===>  Patching for vorbis-tools-1.0b4_1,1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for vorbis-tools-1.0b4_1,1
  I can't seem to find a patch in there anywhere.
===>   Ignoring patchfile
/usr/ports/audio/vorbis-tools/files/patch-ac.orig
===>   Ignoring patchfile
/usr/ports/audio/vorbis-tools/files/patch-ad.orig
===>  Configuring for vorbis-tools-1.0b4_1,1
autoconf: Undefined macros:
configure.in:70:AC_FUNC_SMMAP
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/vorbis-tools.
...

I must've messed something up here...

A.
